data.name: AT0001Description
data.value: TargetDefinition.RequiresParam() should not directly reference a Param property.
data.comment: An optional longer localizable description of the diagnostic.

data.name: AT0001MessageFormat
data.value: Parameter '{0}' should be wrapped with nameof operator
data.comment: The format-able message the diagnostic displays.

data.name: AT0001CodeFixTitle
data.comment: The title of the code fix.

data.name: AT0002Description
data.value: Interfaces decorated with [ConfigureHost] must implement the generated partial method ConfigureHostFrom{InterfaceName}.
data.comment: An optional longer localizable description of the diagnostic.

data.name: AT0002MessageFormat
data.value: Interface '{0}' is missing the required partial method implementation '{1}'
data.comment: The format-able message the diagnostic displays.

data.name: AT0002CodeFixTitle
data.comment: The title of the code fix.

data.name: AT0003Description
data.value: Interfaces decorated with [ConfigureHostBuilder] must implement the generated partial method ConfigureBuilderFrom{InterfaceName}.
data.comment: An optional longer localizable description of the diagnostic.

data.name: AT0003MessageFormat
data.value: Interface '{0}' is missing the required partial method implementation '{1}'
data.comment: The format-able message the diagnostic displays.

data.name: AT0003CodeFixTitle
data.comment: The title of the code fix.
